reason: Release contains only internal bug fixes across 7 Comments items. No public API methods, props, hooks, events, or documented behavior patterns were added, removed, renamed, or changed. Specifically: commentSidebarFilters$ sentinel initialization, effectiveSidebarFilters$ stream, and mergeClientFilters null-handling are all internal RxJS/service implementation details; isHotkeyAlreadyAtCursor() and getSelectionFromElement() are internal component helpers; the @mention sorted-replacement placeholder mechanism is internal text processing; and addFilterCommentsOnDomCheck is an internal parameter on a non-public function. None of these changes affect how developers integrate or call Velt Comments APIs.
